pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'You are an IT Systems Manager' which aligns with this occupational classification.
Task description explicitly places the scenario at a 'mid-size SaaS company'.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require exactly this channel name.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce these three user accounts to be invited.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require direct messaging this specific user account.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically seeded Rocket.Chat environment representing a SaaS IT incident. It is explicitly verified that the target incident channel must be named 'inc-20260306-db-outage', the on-call responders required to be invited are 'ops.lead', 'backend.dev', and 'dba.admin', and the target for the regression test direct message is 'qa.engineer'. All metadata claims align perfectly with the setup scripts, export routines, and verifier logic.
